name: @rawsql-ts/testkit-postgres
description: Postgres-specific fixture/rewriter logic that stays driver-agnostic.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter rawsql-ts run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/sql-contract run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/testkit-core run build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../tmp', { recursive: true })" && pnpm pack --out ../../tmp/rawsql-ts-testkit-postgres.tgz && pnpm publish --access public

author: msugiura
